incident.title: Suspected Lateral Movement → Crown Jewel Exfiltration

timeline_events.title: Auth bypass signature match
timeline_events.description: Signature CVE-2025-33421 matched on Apache Struts endpoint.

timeline_events.title: Hypothesis generated: WebSvr → AppSvr pivot
timeline_events.description: A3-Reasoner links EV-91021 & EV-91022. Predicts lateral to app-03.

timeline_events.title: SMB session opened app-03
timeline_events.description: app-03 accepted SMB session from web-01 svc-account.

timeline_events.title: A4-Critic challenge issued
timeline_events.description: Adversarial critic ruled out benign patch-management explanation (score 0.11).

timeline_events.title: Crown-jewel DB read spike
timeline_events.description: Result DB reads jumped 640× baseline in 4s. Row count ≈ 1.2M.

timeline_events.title: Decision proposed: isolate app-03
timeline_events.description: A7-SOAR proposes network isolation of app-03 (blast_radius=LOW).

timeline_events.title: Human Gate: awaiting confirm
timeline_events.description: SOC analyst review required (SLA 15m). Confirmed at T+27s.

timeline_events.title: app-03 isolated (VLAN quarantine)
timeline_events.description: SOAR playbook PB-ISO-02 executed. Reversible in 60s.

timeline_events.title: Decision: block egress to 185.203.116.44
timeline_events.description: Firewall rule pushed. Global block list updated.

timeline_events.title: Egress blocked at edge firewall
timeline_events.description: Rule ACL-EG-9931 active. Exfil channel severed.

timeline_events.title: Incident CONTAINED
timeline_events.description: No further beaconing. Crown Jewel integrity verified via A8-hash-chain.

pending_decisions.action_taken: Push YARA rule y_cobalt_v3 to all endpoints

chatbot_responses.why was this flagged: This incident was flagged because A3-Reasoner correlated Evidence EV-91021 (base64 POST) and EV-91022 (CVE-2025-33421 signature) with a confidence of 0.82 — see Hypothesis HYP-2026-014.
chatbot_responses.why was app-03 isolated: app-03 was quarantined at T+27s after Decision DEC-77014 (blast_radius=LOW) was confirmed by SOC analyst 'a.sharma'. The trigger was a 640× read spike on db-crown-01 from an app-03 session.
chatbot_responses.what's the next predicted move: A5-GNN predicts lateral movement app-03 → auth-svc (attention weight 0.40), followed by auth-svc → db-audit (0.30). A quarantine on app-04 is pending your approval as DEC-77017.
chatbot_responses.next predicted hop: auth-svc — GAT attention weight 0.40. Consider pre-emptively rotating svc-account credentials (see DEC-77016).
chatbot_responses.isolate the host: Isolating app-03 severs the SMB pivot path used by the actor. Reversible in <60s via SOAR playbook PB-ISO-02. Estimated business impact: 12 non-critical batch jobs delayed.
chatbot_responses.cert-in: The CERT-In 6-hour reporting window is active. Draft report auto-generated from the audit chain. Download it from the CERT-In Report tab.
chatbot_responses.kill switch: The Kill Switch (SD-8) freezes all autonomous SOAR actions immediately. Only CISO or SysAdmin can release it. Every activation is SHA-256 signed to the immutable audit chain.
